shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -c 'set -e
cd /home/user/workspace/dst
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar > /tmp/hello-world-api.log 2>&1 &
pid=$!
cleanup() { kill $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }
trap cleanup EXIT
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3000/ >/tmp/hello-default.json 2>/dev/null; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done
curl -fsS '"'http://127.0.0.1:3000/?name=  Ada  ' >/tmp/hello-name.json
printf 'default='; cat /tmp/hello-default.json
printf '\\nname='; cat /tmp/hello-name.json
"

/bin/bash -c 'set -e
cd /home/user/workspace/dst
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar > /tmp/hello-world-api.log 2>&1 &
pid=$!
cleanup() { kill $pid >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; }
trap cleanup EXIT
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3000/ >/tmp/hello-default.json 2>/dev/null; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 1
done
curl -fsS --get --data-urlencode '"'name=  Ada  ' http://127.0.0.1:3000/ >/tmp/hello-name.json
printf 'default='; cat /tmp/hello-default.json
printf '\\nname='; cat /tmp/hello-name.json
"
